text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down slightly under 0.8% in the last day, with altcoins tracking similarly, suggesting a mild pullback rather than capitulation. The Fear & Greed index sits at 18 (extreme fear) while climbing over the past week, indicating investor sentiment is starting to recover from deeper lows even as prices remain under pressure. Bitcoin dominance at 56.5% and moderate 24-hour volume of $46B point to cautious repositioning rather than panic selling or conviction buying.
